Meta.appTitle: Radius Product Bundles App for Shopify

dashboard.title: Dashboard - Product Bundles Overview
dashboard.description: View your bundle performance at a glance. Track revenue, conversion rates, active bundles, and key metrics. Monitor your product bundle campaigns and optimize for maximum sales growth.

bundles.title: Product Bundles - Bundle Manager
bundles.description: Manage all your product bundles in one place. View performance metrics, edit active offers, track sales, and optimize your bundle campaigns to increase average order value.

bundleCreate.title: Bundle Creation - Select Bundle Type
bundleCreate.description: Choose the perfect bundle type for your products. Create fixed bundles, volume discounts, mix & match, BOGO offers, and more to increase sales and average order value.

bundleCreateFallback.title: Create Bundle
bundleCreateFallback.description: Create a new product bundle to increase sales.

analytics.title: Analytics - Bundle Performance Dashboard
analytics.description: Analyze your bundle performance with detailed insights. View revenue, conversions, active bundles, and real-time metrics to optimize your product bundle strategy.

settings.title: Settings - Manage Your Bundle Preferences
settings.description: Customize your bundle app experience. Configure general settings, analytics preferences, and store integrations to optimize your workflow and performance tracking.

customizer.title: Customizer - Manage Your Bundle Customization
customizer.description: Customize your bundle app experience. Configure general settings, analytics preferences, and store integrations to optimize your workflow and performance tracking.

pricing.title: Pricing - Flexible Plans for Every Business
pricing.description: Choose the perfect plan for your store. Compare features, bundle limits, and analytics access. Start free and upgrade anytime to unlock advanced bundle performance insights and premium support.

support.title: Support - Help & Resources
support.description: Browse docs, watch tutorials, or contact the Radius Bundles support team.

Modals.confirmContinue: Are you sure you want to continue?

duplicate.heading: Duplicate Bundle
duplicate.draftCreated: A new draft will be created.
duplicate.message: Duplicate {name}? A new draft will be created.

delete.heading: Delete Bundle
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

quotaExceeded.heading: Bundle limit reached
quotaExceeded.message: You have reached your plan's bundle limit ({current}/{limit}).

deleteProduct.heading: Delete bundle product?
deleteProduct.message: Turning off this switch will permanently delete {product} from your store when you save. This action cannot be undone.

restoreDefaults.heading: Restore defaults?
restoreDefaults.message: This will reset all style settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

importSettings.heading: Import Settings?
importSettings.message: This will overwrite your current settings with the data from the file. This action cannot be undone.

Validation.MAX_PRODUCTS: Bundle cannot have more than 10 products
Validation.DUPLICATE_PRODUCTS: Duplicate products are not allowed in the bundle
Validation.INVALID_DISCOUNT_VALUE: Discount value must be greater than 0
Validation.NO_PRODUCTS_SELECTED: At least two products must be selected
Validation.NO_PRODUCTS_SELECTED_VOLUME: At least one product must be selected
Validation.INVALID_MIN_ORDER: Minimum order value must be greater than 0
Validation.INVALID_MAX_DISCOUNT: Maximum discount amount must be greater than 0
Validation.END_DATE_AFTER_START: End date must be after start date
Validation.MAX_DISCOUNT_NOT_APPLICABLE: Maximum discount amount is not applicable for custom price
Validation.CUSTOM_PRICE_INVALID: Custom price must be greater than 0
Validation.PERCENTAGE_POSITIVE: Percentage discount must be greater than 0
Validation.FIXED_AMOUNT_POSITIVE: Fixed amount must be greater than 0
Validation.BXGY_QUANTITIES_REQUIRED: Buy X Get Y bundles require buyQuantity and getQuantity
Validation.TRIGGER_REQUIRED: At least one trigger product is required
Validation.REWARD_REQUIRED: At least one reward product is required
Validation.VOLUME_TIERS_REQUIRED: Volume discount bundles require volume tiers
Validation.MIX_MATCH_PRICING: Mix and match bundles require pricing configuration
Validation.SCHEDULED_DATES_REQUIRED: Scheduled bundles require both start and end dates
Validation.MAX_PRODUCTS_20: Cannot have more than 20 products in a bundle
Validation.FILL_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields
Validation.TIER_TITLE_MAX: Title must be 50 characters or less
Validation.TIER_SUBTITLE_MAX: Subtitle must be 80 characters or less
Validation.MIN_TIERS: At least one tier is required
Validation.TIER_ONE_DEFAULT: Only one tier can be pre-selected

Dashboard.title: Welcome to Radius Bundles
Dashboard.description: Manage your product bundles and increase your average order value.

SetupGuide.heading: Get started with Product Bundles
SetupGuide.subheading: Use this personalized guide to get your app up and running.

enableAppEmbed.title: Enable the app embed
enableAppEmbed.description: Activate the Product Bundles app embed in your theme editor. This is required for bundle widgets, analytics tracking, and storefront functionality to work on your store.

createFirstBundle.title: Create your first product bundle
createFirstBundle.description: Select a bundle type — Fixed Bundle, BOGO, Volume Discount, or Mix & Match — add products, configure pricing, and publish to start selling.

addWidgetToTheme.title: Add bundle widget to your theme
addWidgetToTheme.description: Add the bundle widget block to your product pages in the theme editor. This displays your bundles on the storefront so customers can see and add them to their cart.

customizeSettings.title: Customize your settings
customizeSettings.description: Configure your global display preferences and style the bundle widget to match your store's branding — adjust layout, colors, typography, and button styles.

previewStorefront.title: Preview your live storefront
previewStorefront.description: Visit your online store to verify how bundles appear to customers. Check the widget layout, discount display, and add-to-cart experience on a real product page.

monitorAnalytics.title: Monitor bundle analytics
monitorAnalytics.description: Track key metrics like bundle views, add-to-cart rate, conversion rate, and revenue generated across all your bundles from the analytics dashboard.

QuickActions.heading: Quick Actions
QuickActions.description: Common tasks and shortcuts for managing your product bundles

Features.heading: Powerful Bundle Features
Features.bundleTypes: Multiple bundle types — Fixed, BOGO, Volume, Mix & Match
Features.discounts: Flexible discounts — Percentage, fixed amount, custom pricing
Features.styleCustomizer: Style customizer — Match your store's branding with zero code
Features.analytics: Built-in analytics — Track views, conversions, and revenue

Bundles.recentActiveDesc: Your most recently updated active bundles.
Bundles.errorDesc: Something went wrong while loading your bundles. Please try refreshing the page.
Bundles.noActiveDesc: Create and activate a bundle to see it here.
Bundles.name: Name

MediaCard.title: Update your plan
MediaCard.description: Unlock advanced features and priority support. Upgrade today to get the most out of your bundles.

support.title: Need any support?
support.description: Step by step guide to install and activate BundleSuite on your store.

features.title: Upcoming new features
features.description: Watch our video tutorials to learn how to use BundleSuite.

helpDocs.title: Help docs
helpDocs.description: Explore app features with video & documentation guides.

Videos.videoDescription: Bundles are a great way to increase average order value.

Review.helpBySharing: Help us by sharing your experience

0.title: How would you rate our app?
0.description: Your feedback helps us improve the experience for everyone. It will take you less than a minute.

1.title: We're sorry to hear that!
1.description: Help us improve by telling us what went wrong.

2.title: We can do better!
2.description: Let us know what we can improve to make your experience better.

3.title: Thanks for the feedback!
3.description: We'd love to know how we can make this even better for you.

4.title: Great to hear!
4.description: What did you like most? Your feedback helps us keep improving.

5.title: Awesome!
5.description: We're thrilled you love our app! Consider sharing your experience.

AppEmbed.notEnabledDesc: The bundle functionalities and analytics won't work correctly on your storefront until the app embed is activated in your theme editor.
AppEmbed.notEnabledYet: App embed is not enabled yet
AppEmbed.blockIsActive: Bundle widget is active on a product page
AppEmbed.blockNotAddedYet: Bundle widget is not added to any product page yet

WidgetBlock.notAdded: Bundle widget not added to your theme
WidgetBlock.notAddedDesc: Your bundle widget hasn't been added to any product page yet. Add it to your theme to display bundles on your storefront.

Integration.bothMissingDesc: The app embed and bundle widget are not set up yet. Enable both in your theme editor for bundles to work on your storefront.

Statuses.DRAFT_desc: Work in progress, not visible to customers
Statuses.SCHEDULED_desc: Will go live at the scheduled time

Actions.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

BulkActions.bulkDeleteSuccess: Selected bundles have been deleted successfully

Schedule.statusTooltip: Shows the current state of this bundle and how it appears in your store.
Schedule.notLiveDraft: This bundle is a draft and will not be displayed on the storefront until its status is set to Active.
Schedule.notLivePaused: This bundle is paused and is hidden from the storefront. Set status to Active to resume.
Schedule.notLiveArchived: This bundle is archived and will not be displayed on the storefront.
Schedule.notLiveScheduled: This bundle will go live automatically on the scheduled start date.
Schedule.notLiveScheduledOn: This bundle goes live automatically on {date}.
Schedule.dateRangeHint: Set the date range when this bundle will be active.
Schedule.dateRequired: Please set both start and end dates for scheduled bundles.

Common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
Common.duplicateConfirm: Are you sure you want to duplicate this bundle?
Common.duplicateConfirmUnsaved: You have unsaved changes that will be discarded. Are you sure you want to duplicate this bundle?

Selection.title: Select bundle type
Selection.description: Choose the type of bundle that best fits your offer
Selection.upgradePlanDesc: Unlock advanced features and priority support. Upgrade today to get the most out of your bundles.
Selection.helpDescription: Not sure which bundle type is right for your products? Here are some quick guidelines:

Details.heading: Bundle details
Details.tooltip: Name and describe your bundle. These fields are used internally to identify this bundle in your admin.
Details.name: Bundle name
Details.descriptionDetails: Used internally to describe the bundle.

Products.minProductHint: Add at least one more product to create a bundle.
Products.bogoSameProduct: BOGO: 1 product selected. The same product will be used for both Buy and Get.
Products.sameProductBogoDetails: Customer buys and gets the same product (e.g., Buy 1 Get 1 Free)
Products.sameProductBxgyDetails: Use the same products for both Buy and Get groups
Products.maxReached: Maximum {count} products reached for this bundle.

Discount.heading: Discount Settings
Discount.tooltip: Configure the discount type and value applied when customers purchase this bundle.
Discount.discountValueDesc: Enter the discount to apply when customers purchase this bundle.
Discount.minOrderValueDesc: Require a minimum cart total before this discount applies.
Discount.maxDiscountDesc: Cap the maximum discount a customer can receive.
Discount.rewardTooltip: This discount applies only to the reward product(s) the customer gets. Trigger products are always at full price.
Discount.rewardOnly: Discount applies to reward products only
Discount.bogoFreeHint: To give reward items completely free, set the value to 100%.
Discount.behaviorTooltip: Control how the discount is distributed across products and whether free shipping is included.
Discount.applySpecific: Apply discount to specific products only
Discount.chooseProducts: Choose which products should receive the discount.
Discount.noProductsYet: No products in bundle. Add products first.
Discount.freeShippingDetails: Offer free shipping when this bundle is purchased.

VolumeDiscount.heading: Discount Settings
VolumeDiscount.tooltip: Set how discounts scale with quantity. Each tier applies a discount when the customer buys at least the specified quantity.
VolumeDiscount.openEndedDetails: Apply the last tier's discount to all quantities above the maximum.
VolumeDiscount.minQuantityDetails: Minimum items a customer must add to cart.
VolumeDiscount.discountDetails: Discount applied when this tier is activated.
VolumeDiscount.tierTitleDetails: Shown on the storefront. Use {quantity} and {discount} as dynamic variables.
VolumeDiscount.subtitle: Subtitle
VolumeDiscount.subtitleDetails: Secondary text shown below the title on the storefront.
VolumeDiscount.badgeStyleDetails: Highlight label displayed on this tier option.
VolumeDiscount.badgeTextDetails: Label text shown inside the badge.
VolumeDiscount.preselectDetails: This tier will be selected by default when customers view the bundle.

BundleAsProduct.heading: Bundle as product
BundleAsProduct.willCreate: This bundle will create a product with its own product page.
BundleAsProduct.willNotCreate: This bundle will NOT create a standalone product.
BundleAsProduct.syncBanner: Any changes to the title, description, or media images will automatically update the Shopify product when you save the bundle.
BundleAsProduct.title: Title
BundleAsProduct.editToUpdate: Edit to update the shopify product title
BundleAsProduct.noImages: No images available from selected products.
BundleAsProduct.uploadImageTypes: Upload image of type jpg, png, or gif
BundleAsProduct.uploadInvalidSingle: File too large or invalid type. Max 20MB. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC
BundleAsProduct.uploadInvalidMultiple: {count} files too large or invalid type. Max 20MB. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC

Appearance.displayTooltip: Toggle visual features of the bundle widget, such as images, prices, and savings badges.
Appearance.layoutTooltip: Select the layout for your bundle widget to display.
Appearance.productPageTooltip: Customize the widget title and button text shown on product pages where this bundle appears.

Preview.heading: Preview
Preview.globalCustomizerTooltip: Use the global customization settings to style your bundle display, including colors and visual elements, to align with your store's branding.
Preview.priorityTooltipIndex: The bundle with the highest priority is displayed when multiple bundles apply to a product.
Preview.priorityTooltipDiscount: The bundle with the highest discount value is displayed when multiple bundles apply to a product.
Preview.emptyState: Please choose products to see the bundle preview

FIXED_BUNDLE.label: Fixed bundle
FIXED_BUNDLE.description: Bundle products together at a fixed price with discount

BUY_X_GET_Y.label: Buy X Get Y
BUY_X_GET_Y.description: Customer buys X items and gets Y items free or discounted

BOGO.label: BOGO
BOGO.description: Classic buy one get one offer with various discount options

VOLUME_DISCOUNT.label: Volume discount
VOLUME_DISCOUNT.description: Offer discounts based on quantity purchased

PERCENTAGE.label: Discount Percentage
PERCENTAGE.description: Discount as a percentage of the original price

CUSTOM_PRICE.label: Bundle Price
CUSTOM_PRICE.description: Set a specific price for the bundle

BUY_X_GET_Y.label: Buy X Get Y
BUY_X_GET_Y.description: Buy certain quantity and get items free/discounted

discount.title: Discount
discount.description: Set up discount rules and behavior

showImages.label: Display product images
showImages.details: Show product images for each item included in the bundle.

showSavingsBadge.label: Display savings badge
showSavingsBadge.details: Highlight savings with a badge on eligible bundle items.

showPrices.label: Display individual product prices
showPrices.details: Show the price of each product included in the bundle.

showComparePrices.label: Display compare-at prices
showComparePrices.details: Show the original (compare-at) price alongside the current price.

showQuantity.label: Display product quantities
showQuantity.details: Show the quantity of each product included in the bundle.

showSavings.label: Display total bundle savings
showSavings.details: Show the total amount customers save when purchasing the bundle.

showFreeShipping.label: Display free shipping message
showFreeShipping.details: Inform customers when the bundle qualifies for free shipping.

enableHyperLink.label: Enable product page link
enableHyperLink.details: Link product titles to their respective product pages.

Listing.title: Bundle Management
Listing.description: Create and manage your product bundle offers

EmptyState.noDataDescription: Get started by creating your first bundle to manage product offers.
EmptyState.noFilterResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search terms or filters to see more results.

Locales.title: Languages
Locales.fallbackTooltip: If a translation is missing in the language file, the empty fields will fall back to the primary language ({primary}).
Locales.refresh: Languages are synced from your Shopify store settings. Use the refresh button to update the list if you've recently made changes in Shopify.
Locales.autoTranslateTooltip: Automatically translate empty label fields from the primary language using machine translation. You can edit the results before saving.

defaults.title: Defaults
defaults.tooltip: Default values applied when creating new bundles.

cart-behavior.title: Cart Behavior
cart-behavior.tooltip: Control how the app interacts with the cart and checkout.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.tooltip: Control data collection and tracking behavior.

performance.title: Performance
performance.tooltip: Control how storefront data is cached for faster page loads.

defaultDiscountType.label: Default discount type
defaultDiscountType.details: Applied to new bundles by default

maxBundleProducts.label: Max products per bundle
maxBundleProducts.details: Maximum products allowed in a single bundle

maxBundlesPerShop.label: Max bundles per shop
maxBundlesPerShop.details: Total bundles limit (based on your plan)

bundlePriorityType.label: Bundle priority strategy
bundlePriorityType.details: When multiple bundles apply to a product, determines which one is displayed. Index-based uses manual priority numbers; Discount-based picks the bundle with the highest effective savings.

redirectAfterCart.label: After add to cart
redirectAfterCart.details: Select what should happen after a customer adds a bundle to the cart.

hidePaymentButtons.label: Hide third-party payment buttons
hidePaymentButtons.details: Hides PayPal, Apple Pay, etc. on product and cart pages. Does not affect checkout page.

enableStockValidation.label: Enable stock validation
enableStockValidation.details: Disables the bundle button when any product in the bundle is out of stock.

maxBundlesPerOrder.label: Max bundles per order
maxBundlesPerOrder.details: Limit how many bundles a customer can add to their cart. Prevents discount abuse. 0 = unlimited.

showSavingsBanner.label: Show savings banner in cart
showSavingsBanner.details: Display a banner on the cart page showing how much customers save with their bundles.

allowDiscountStacking.label: Allow discount stacking
allowDiscountStacking.details: Let bundle discounts combine with other store discounts (coupon codes, automatic discounts, shipping discounts).

enableAnalytics.label: Enable analytics tracking
enableAnalytics.details: Track bundle views, add-to-carts, and purchases. Disable for GDPR compliance or if you use external analytics.

cacheTtl.label: Storefront cache duration
cacheTtl.details: How long browsers cache product data. Longer = faster pages, but price/availability changes take longer to appear.

lazyLoadImages.label: Lazy load product images
lazyLoadImages.details: Defer loading of product images until they are visible on screen. Improves initial page load speed.

style-customizer.title: Style Customizer
style-customizer.tooltip: Set global colors, typography, and styling for all bundle widgets.
style-customizer.description: Customize colors, typography, buttons, badges, and more. These styles apply to all bundle widgets and can be overridden per-page in the Theme Editor.

widget-text.title: Widget Texts
widget-text.tooltip: Customize the main texts displayed in bundle widgets.

button-states.title: Button States
button-states.tooltip: Text shown during different button states.

price-labels.title: Price Labels
price-labels.tooltip: Labels displayed next to prices in the bundle widget.

shipping-labels.title: Shipping Labels
shipping-labels.tooltip: Text related to shipping displayed in the widget.

cart-limits.title: Cart Limits
cart-limits.tooltip: Text shown when cart bundle limits are reached.

bogo-labels.title: BOGO / Buy X Get Y Labels
bogo-labels.tooltip: Labels specific to BOGO and Buy X Get Y bundle layouts.

cart-banner.title: Cart Page Savings Banner
cart-banner.tooltip: Text displayed in the cart page savings banner.

headingLabel.label: Bundle heading
headingLabel.details: Main heading displayed above the bundle widget.

addToCartText.label: Add to cart button
addToCartText.details: Text on the add to cart button.

regularPriceLabel.label: Regular price label
regularPriceLabel.details: Label for the original total price.

bundlePriceLabel.label: Bundle price label
bundlePriceLabel.details: Label for the discounted bundle price.

savingsBadgeText.label: Savings badge text
savingsBadgeText.details: Text on savings badge. Use {amount} for the discount value.

freeShippingLabel.label: Free shipping label
freeShippingLabel.details: Displayed when bundle includes free shipping.

freeShippingMethodTitle.label: Free shipping method title
freeShippingMethodTitle.details: Shipping discount message shown at checkout. Use {name} for bundle name.

maxBundlesReachedText.label: Max bundles reached message
maxBundlesReachedText.details: Shown when customer tries to exceed the max bundles per order limit. Use {count} for the limit number.

bogoBadgeText.label: Deal badge text
bogoBadgeText.details: Custom deal badge text. Leave empty to auto-generate from quantities and discount.

bogoFreeText.label: Free text
bogoFreeText.details: Text shown on reward products when they are free (100% discount).

bogoYouPayLabel.label: You pay label
bogoYouPayLabel.details: Label above the final price in the pricing bar.

bogoYouSaveLabel.label: You save label
bogoYouSaveLabel.details: Label above the savings amount in the pricing bar.

bogoTriggerBadgeText.label: Trigger badge text
bogoTriggerBadgeText.details: Badge on the trigger (buy) product card.

bogoRewardBadgeText.label: Reward badge text
bogoRewardBadgeText.details: Badge on the reward (get) product card.

bogoTotalLabel.label: Total label
bogoTotalLabel.details: Label before the total price in the footer.

bogoSaveText.label: Save text
bogoSaveText.details: Savings text in the footer. Use {amount} for the value.

checklistProgressText.label: Checklist progress text
checklistProgressText.details: Progress count text. Use {count} for checked items and {total} for total items.

checklistHintText.label: Checklist hint text
checklistHintText.details: Hint shown when items remain. Use {remaining} for remaining count.

checklistCompletedText.label: Checklist completed text
checklistCompletedText.details: Hint shown when all items are selected.

checklistLockedLabel.label: Locked reward label
checklistLockedLabel.details: Reward section heading when items are not yet selected.
checklistLockedLabel.placeholder: Unlock by adding all items above

checklistUnlockedLabel.label: Unlocked reward label
checklistUnlockedLabel.details: Reward section heading when all items are selected.

checklistPricingLockedText.label: Pricing locked text
checklistPricingLockedText.details: Text shown in pricing box before all items are selected.
checklistPricingLockedText.placeholder: Select all items to see your price

bannerSavingText.label: Savings message
bannerSavingText.details: Use {discount} for savings value and {name} for bundle name.

bannerCustomPriceText.label: Custom price message
bannerCustomPriceText.details: Use {price} for bundle price and {name} for bundle name.

bannerFreeShippingQualifyText.label: Free shipping qualify message
bannerFreeShippingQualifyText.details: Use {name} for bundle name. Shown for bundles with free shipping only.

bannerFreeShippingText.label: Free shipping included message
bannerFreeShippingText.details: Additional message when bundle includes free shipping.

custom-css.title: Custom CSS
custom-css.tooltip: Add custom CSS for advanced styling. Only use if you have CSS knowledge.

customCssClass.label: Custom CSS class
customCssClass.details: Add a custom class to the bundle widget container for targeted styling.

customCss.label: Custom CSS
customCss.details: Write custom CSS for unique visual customizations. Applied to all pages where the bundle widget loads.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.tooltip: Export or import your app settings.

export.title: Export settings
export.description: Download a backup of all your current settings.

import.title: Import settings
import.description: Restore settings from a previously exported JSON file.

syncCache.title: Sync & Cache
syncCache.tooltip: Manually sync data or clear cache if you experience issues.

sync.title: Sync to Shopify
sync.description: Force sync all settings and bundle data to Shopify metafields.

clear.title: Clear app cache
clear.description: Clear all cached data including bundles, analytics, and settings.

webhooks.title: Webhook Management
webhooks.tooltip: Check or re-register webhook subscriptions with Shopify from Radius product bundles app.

check.title: Check webhooks
check.description: View all currently registered webhook subscriptions from Radius product bundles app.

register.title: Force register webhooks
register.description: Reset and re-register all webhooks with Shopify.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.tooltip: Destructive actions that cannot be undone.

reset.title: Reset app settings
reset.description: Reset all settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

reset.heading: Reset all settings?
reset.body1: This will reset all your settings to their default values. Your bundles will not be affected, but all customizations to colors, labels, and other settings will be lost.

responsive.inheritTooltip: Inheriting from Desktop. Click to customize for {deviceLabel}.
responsive.overrideTooltip: Customized for {deviceLabel}. Click to reset to Desktop value.

restoreDefaultsModal.heading: Restore defaults?
restoreDefaultsModal.message: This will reset all style settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.description: Clean and simple with sharp edges

dark.name: Dark
dark.description: Sleek dark theme with vibrant accents

warm.name: Warm
warm.description: Inviting warm tones that feel friendly and human

Config.field_stylePreset_details: Choose a preset and customize from there
Config.field_textColor_details: Headings, product names, and body text
Config.field_buttonBgColor_details: Leave empty to use accent color
Config.field_customBreakpoints_details: Override preset with exact pixel values

PreviewLabels.checklistLockedLabel: Unlock by adding all items above
PreviewLabels.checklistPricingLockedText: Select all items to see your price

Toast.cachePartialError: Server cache clear failed, client caches cleared

Submit.createProductFailed: Could not create Shopify product. Please try again.
Submit.deleteProductFailed: Could not delete the Shopify product.
Submit.invalidMode: Invalid mode or missing bundle ID for edit.
Submit.checkInputs: Please check your inputs and try again.

ServiceErrors.rateLimitExceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Maximum {max} bundles per hour. Please try again later.
ServiceErrors.shopSuspended: Shop account is suspended. Please contact support for assistance.
ServiceErrors.trialExpired: Trial period has expired. Please upgrade your plan.
ServiceErrors.shopNotConfigured: Shop is not properly configured. Please complete setup.
ServiceErrors.quotaExceeded: Shop has reached maximum bundle limit ({limit})
ServiceErrors.duplicateName: A bundle with this name already exists
ServiceErrors.operationTimedOut: Operation timed out. Please try again with fewer products.
ServiceErrors.suspiciousActivity: Suspicious activity detected. Please contact support.

Badges.highConverterTooltip: Exceptional {rate}% conversion rate. This bundle is highly effective at turning views into sales.
Badges.revenueStarTooltip: Top revenue performer with {revenue} earned. A major contributor to your store's income.
Badges.hiddenGemTooltip: Strong {rate}% conversion with only {views} views. Consider promoting this bundle more for greater impact.
Badges.trendingTooltip: Growing fast with {growth}% revenue increase vs previous period. Momentum is building!
Badges.decliningTooltip: Revenue decreased {drop}% vs previous period. Review pricing, promotion, or bundle composition.
Badges.highInterestTooltip: Strong {atcRate}% add-to-cart rate shows high customer interest. Focus on improving checkout conversion.

Analytics.title: Bundle Analytics & Customer Insights
Analytics.description: Comprehensive insights into your bundle performance and customer behavior.

EmptyStates.noDataDesc: Analytics data will appear here once your bundles start getting views and purchases.
EmptyStates.noActivityDesc: Your bundles haven't been viewed yet. Share them with customers to start tracking performance.
EmptyStates.noConversionsDesc: Your bundles have views but no add-to-cart actions yet. Consider optimizing your bundle presentation.
EmptyStates.noPurchasesDesc: Your bundles have been viewed but haven't been purchased yet. Keep promoting them to your customers!

DisabledBanner.heading: Analytics tracking is paused
DisabledBanner.description: Tracking is currently paused. New events are not being collected, so recent bundle interactions will not appear in these reports. All data displayed here reflects activity recorded before tracking was disabled.

TopBundles.heading: Top Performing Bundles
TopBundles.tooltip: Bundles are ranked by total revenue. Low-traffic bundles are excluded to avoid noise. Trends compare current period with previous period of equal length.
TopBundles.lowSampleSize: Low sample size - conversion rate may fluctuate

AllBundles.heading: All Bundles Performance
AllBundles.tooltip: Detailed performance metrics for all bundles, including revenue, traffic, conversion, and quality signals. Use this view to diagnose opportunities, identify underperforming bundles, and understand funnel behavior.
AllBundles.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search query
AllBundles.noBundlesHint: Create your first bundle to see analytics here
AllBundles.loadError: Failed to load bundle performance data. Please try again.

Metrics.revenueDesc: Total revenue from bundle sales including discounts, excluding shipping, taxes, and fees.
Metrics.viewsDesc: Total number of times bundles were viewed by customers. Each customer counts once per session per bundle.
Metrics.viewsFormula: Views = Unique bundle page visits per session
Metrics.purchasesDesc: Total number of completed bundle purchases from all customers.

Pricing.title: Pricing & Plans
Pricing.description: Choose the right plan for your business
Pricing.faqDescription: Find answers to the most common questions about our pricing and billing model below.
Pricing.devStoreDesc: You can use all BundleSuite features (unlimited bundles, analytics, etc.) completely free on your development store. Choose your paid plan only when you go live!

free.title: Free
free.description: Get started with bundle creation at no cost

features.2: Fixed bundles, BOGO, Buy X Get Y

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: For growing stores that need more power

premium.title: Pro
premium.description: For high-volume stores with advanced needs

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Everything you need to grow your bundle revenue

0.title: What's included in the Free plan?
0.description: The Free plan includes up to 5 bundles, up to 10 products per bundle, Fixed Bundle, BOGO, and Buy X Get Y bundle types, grid and list layouts, basic analytics, and email support.

1.title: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
1.description: Yes. You can upgrade to Pro or downgrade to Free at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, and downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

2.title: Is there a free trial?
2.description: Pro comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start your trial.

3.title: What billing options are available?
3.description: Pro is available on a monthly ($9.99/month) or annual ($99.99/year) billing cycle. Annual billing saves you about 17% compared to monthly.

4.title: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
4.description: On the Free plan, you'll be notified when approaching your bundle or product limits. You can upgrade to Pro at any time for unlimited access.

Support.title: Support
Support.docsDescription: Setup guides, feature references & integration docs
Support.videosDescription: Step-by-step walkthroughs for every bundle type
Support.emailDescription: We reply within 24 hours on business days
Support.proTip: Include your store URL and a screenshot when emailing — it helps us resolve issues 2× faster.
Support.faq1Q: How does the bundle discount get applied — is it a discount code?
Support.faq1A: No discount code needed. Radius Bundles uses a native Shopify Function that runs server-side inside Shopify's checkout engine. When a customer has all the required bundle products in their cart, the discount is calculated and applied automatically at checkout — no scripts injected into your storefront, no conflicts with Shopify Payments or Shop Pay, and no customer action required.
Support.faq2Q: The bundle widget isn't showing on my product pages. How do I fix it?
Support.faq2A: The widget is added as an app block — it won't appear automatically. Open the Theme Editor (Online Store → Themes → Customise), navigate to your product template, click 'Add block' in the left sidebar, and select the Radius Bundles Widget block. Position it where you want it on the page and save. If the block is present but nothing renders, check that the product is included in at least one Active bundle — Draft and Paused bundles don't display the widget. You'll need to add the block to each product template variant where you want it to appear.
Support.faq3Q: What's the difference between Fixed Bundle, BOGO, Volume Discount, and Mix & Match?
Support.faq3A: Fixed Bundle groups specific products at a set discount — ideal for curated gift sets or starter kits. BOGO (Buy One Get One) gives a free or discounted reward product when a qualifying product is purchased. Volume Discount rewards customers who buy more quantity (e.g. buy 3, get 15% off). Mix & Match lets customers build their own combination from a defined product pool with a shared discount. Use Fixed for predictable sets, BOGO/BuyXGetY for promotional campaigns, and Mix & Match when customers should have flexibility.
Support.faq4Q: My customer added all the bundle products but no discount appeared at checkout. Why?
Support.faq4A: Check four things: (1) Bundle status must be Active — Draft and Paused bundles don't apply discounts. (2) If you set a date range, confirm today falls within it. (3) The customer must have the exact required products and variants in their cart at the correct quantities. (4) If you use a third-party checkout replacement app, Shopify Functions may not run — the discount engine requires Shopify's native checkout.
Support.faq5Q: Can I customise how the bundle widget looks on my storefront?
Support.faq5A: Yes — go to Settings → Style Customiser. Four sections let you control everything: Appearance (colours, border radius, background), Product Cards (image ratio, layout direction), Button & Badge (CTA text, discount badge style), and Advanced (custom CSS, spacing). You can also set different styles per device using the Responsive Overrides toggle — useful if you want a stacked layout on mobile and a side-by-side layout on desktop. All changes preview live before you save.

crossSell.heading: Unlock Pro Features
crossSell.description: This feature is available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock powerful tools designed to increase your store's revenue and optimize bundle performance.
